statements.statement: CREATE INDEX `idx_users_email` ON `sample`(`email`) WHERE `userId` IS NOT MISSING USING GSI WITH {'defer_build':true}
CREATE INDEX `idx_users_active` ON `sample`(`active`) WHERE `userId` IS NOT MISSING USING GSI WITH {'defer_build':true}
CREATE INDEX `idx_users_role` ON `sample`(`role`) WHERE `userId` IS NOT MISSING USING GSI WITH {'defer_build':true}
CREATE INDEX `idx_products_category` ON `sample`(`category`) WHERE `productId` IS NOT MISSING USING GSI WITH {'defer_build':true}
CREATE INDEX `idx_products_price` ON `sample`(`price`) WHERE `productId` IS NOT MISSING USING GSI WITH {'defer_build':true}
BUILD INDEX ON `sample` ( ( SELECT RAW name FROM system:indexes WHERE keyspace_id = 'sample' AND state = 'deferred' ));
